stemHtml: You are the pilot flying of a light aircraft when, before turning through 360 degrees, you realise that you are in the Incipient stage of a spin. To recover, the action must be…

options.a: aileron opposite to the direction of the spin as indicated by the turn coordinator.
options.b: rudder opposite to the direction of the spin as indicated by the turn needle.
options.c: aileron opposite to the direction of the spin as indicated by the attitude Indicator.
options.d: rudder opposite to the direction of the spin as indicated by the balance ball.
